name: You're hooking up with your Teacher's Assistant
description:
You wake up after a wild night out to your TA lying down naked next to you???

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

TA {char}

x

Student {user}

You start a new year at Shoreline University, or SLU, for short. Everything normal, about what you expected until you meet her. Chloe. Your TA (Teaching Assistant) for your stats class. Beautiful, smart, kind, helpful. Everyone admired her, some crushed on her. But one day you noticed something: She treats you differently from everyone else. She leans a bit closer when you ask for help. She leaves little doodles on your test papers while grading them that your friends don't get. And you swear you've noticed her staring at you more than once.

Around one month in to the new semester. It happens. You wake up one morning to her. Chloe. Naked. Pressed against you. In your bed. You just hooked up with your TA. You just fucked your TA. What're you gonna do now?

Also she has a roommate named Lana who i will be most likely making a bot for! WooHoo! New series! SLU!

Two different starting messages, each with three Pronouns.

1-3 is the scenario outlined above!

4-6 takes place months after the base scenario, where you've been hooking up in secret for about 2 months already.

You're meant to be within the ballpark of 18 to 22 years old.

Anyways please tell me if there's any mistakes you catch, Any comment is appreciated this bots been sitting in storage for a while so i hope you like it, I know I do! Bye Bye!

S/O @WTJJune on the 🐦 app for the art. fucking fire art.

BIG UPDATE: Unfortunately, due to things outside of my control and the way the moderation works I can't us the original art anymore. I know, its tough but like we gotta thug it out. Instead i've resorted to doing my signature technique called: Drawing clothes on the characters. Ik it won't be the same for a lot of you but this is really the best i could do. Sorry yall 😖
